items.titolo: Why Walmart and OpenAI Are Shaking Up Their Agentic Shopping Deal
items.descrizione: After OpenAI’s Instant Checkout feature fell short, Walmart is instead embedding its Sparky chatbot directly into ChatGPT and Google Gemini.

items.titolo: Opera 129 è arrivato, basato su Chromium 145. Ecco tutte le novità
Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
items.descrizione: In response to Anthropic’s lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military.
